meaning: n.(尤指美国西南部的)小佃农
examples: He wanted to own her as wildly as a miser wants to own gold COINS, as hungrily as a sharecropper wants to own his own land.
Tom's folks muley said had gone to a relative's place preparatory to going west. muley was the only sharecropper to stay behind.
My mother and her family moved 14 times in 16 years while she grew up as a sharecropper.
With no formal education, he busied himself as a sharecropper and day-labourer, working on railways and in mines until the Depression hit.
